name: DeepRAG
description:
Performs deep multi-page extraction with inline citations across up to 1,000 pages of a PDF document. Use this on ALL PDF attachments immediately after Analyze Files to achieve high-accuracy structured extraction of US import shipment documents.

Call this tool with the `attachment` field only — the extraction query is pre-configured as a static setting on this tool and covers all supported US import document types: Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, Arrival Notice, ISF Filing, Customs Entry, and FDA Prior Notice.

The pre-configured static query instructs DeepRAG to: identify the document type, then extract every field on every page with inline citations — including all reference numbers, all party names and addresses, all dates, all cargo/goods descriptions, HS/HTS codes, container and seal numbers, weights, volumes, financial amounts, duties, line items, trade terms, and all other structured data present.

DO NOT skip this tool for PDF documents — it provides citation-backed field-level accuracy that Analyze Files alone cannot guarantee for multi-page import documents.

Input: `attachment` — the PDF job-attachment from `emailAttachment` input.
Output: Array of citation-backed extracted content chunks covering every page.

attachment.title: Source
attachment.description: File or document to analyze with DeepRAG

MimeType.description: The MIME type of the content, such as "application/json" or "image/png"

query.value:
This is a US import shipment document. First identify the document type from this list: Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, Arrival Notice, ISF Filing (10+2), Customs Entry (CBP Form 7501), FDA Prior Notice, or Other.

Then extract EVERY field on EVERY page with inline citations, including:

REFERENCE NUMBERS: BOL number, master BOL number, invoice number, packing list number, certificate number, ISF filing number, entry number, prior notice confirmation number, purchase order number, container numbers (all), seal numbers (all), voyage number, lot numbers (all).

ALL PARTY DETAILS (full name + full address for each): Shipper, Consignee, Notify Party, Second Notify Party, Buyer, Seller, Manufacturer, Ship-To party, Importer of Record, Exporter, Freight Forwarder, Certifying Body, CBP Broker, FDA Submitter.

ALL DATES: Issue date, invoice date, on-board date, bill of lading date, export date, entry date, filing date, estimated arrival date (ETA), actual arrival date, last free day (LFD), certificate issue date, manufacturing dates.

LOCATION & TRANSPORT: Port of loading, port of discharge, place of delivery, place of receipt, country of origin (per line item and overall), country of export, port of entry code and name, terminal name, vessel name, carrier name, carrier SCAC code, flight number (if air freight).

CARGO & GOODS: Description of goods, HS/HTS codes (all, per line item), FDA product code, number of packages, package type, marks and numbers, storage/handling conditions, intended use.

WEIGHTS & DIMENSIONS: Total gross weight (kg and lbs), total net weight (kg), total volume (CBM), per-line-item weights and dimensions (L x W x H cm).

ALL LINE ITEMS (extract every row completely): Line number, product/item code, description, HS/HTS code, quantity, unit of measure, unit price, total price, country of origin per line, net weight, gross weight, dimensions, volume, duty rate, duty amount, entered value.

FINANCIAL DATA: Subtotal, freight charges, insurance charges, other charges, total invoice amount, total entered value, total duty, total tax, total fees, total amount due, currency, AD/CVD amounts, bond number, bond type.

TRADE TERMS: Incoterms, freight terms (Prepaid/Collect), payment terms, trade agreement (USMCA, GSP, FTA, CAFTA, etc.), preferential origin (yes/no).

COMPLIANCE & CERTIFICATION: Certifying officer name and title, signature present (yes/no), official stamp/seal present (yes/no), importer EIN/IRS number, manufacturer FEI number, importer of record number, CBP broker license number, filer code, relationship indicator.

CUSTOMS ENTRY SPECIFIC: Entry type code, AD/CVD case numbers, HTS number, relationship indicator per line.

ISF SPECIFIC: All 10 importer data elements, both carrier data elements, container stuffing location, consolidator name and address.

FDA SPECIFIC: Manufacturer FEI number, FDA product code, country of production, lot numbers, storage temperature requirements.

Extract everything visible. Leave nothing out. Provide inline page citations for every extracted field.

content.description: The content of the analyzed attachment
